rationale: The bus-sorting puzzle hook is a fundamentally different mechanic (sort/path-clearing puzzle) from Knock'em All's tap-to-shoot physics ragdoll loop, so reusing this concept would mislead installs and hurt D1 retention. Palette and casual-relaxation framing share some hypercasual audience overlap, but the top-down stylus interaction, muted puzzle palette, and 'relaxing' pitch clash with the game's first-person aiming, vibrant red dummies, and punchy comic-book hit feedback. Recommend skipping a direct copy; if testing the 'satisfaction' angle, rebuild around oddly-satisfying ragdoll knockdowns with the VO question hook only.
